description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the strages/pandoc-docker Docker image. Define a single job called pages (default stage) that runs the following shell commands in order: cp fonts/* /usr/share/fonts/, fc-cache -f -v, echo "fonts are installed", make, and echo "pdf generated, well done machine!". The job should publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No caches, variables, services, or special rules are required.
